description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular wooden toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing several internal compartments for organizing tools or small items. The exterior is adorned with engraved symbols and markings, giving it a distinctive, possibly mystical or antique appearance. The front features a round, metallic rotary knob and a metal latch, while the sides are reinforced with dark metal brackets. The interior is divided into multiple sections, including a large lower compartment and three upper trays of varying sizes. A large brass plaque with engraved text and a central emblem is mounted on the back of the lid. The wood has a dark, matte finish, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional.
description: A wooden toolbox with engraved symbols, metal reinforcements, and multiple internal compartments, featuring a brass plaque and rotary latch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, internal compartments, rotary knob, and engraved symbols on the front panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the box, side engravings, and the open lid's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large brass plaque with engraved text and emblem, as well as the back panel's engravings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side engravings, compartment layout, and the open lid from a different angle.
attribute_handle_type: No traditional carrying handle is visible; the rotary knob on the front is used for opening or securing the lid, and is made of metal with a round, textured design.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Rotary latch mechanism on the front, made of metal, with a round knob for turning and securing the lid.
attribute_brand_logo: A large brass plaque on the back of the lid features an emblem and engraved text, possibly indicating a brand or institution.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The interior contains three upper compartments of varying sizes and one large lower compartment; all dividers appear fixed and non-removable.
attribute_external_labeling: Engraved symbols and markings on the front, sides, and back panels; brass plaque on the back of the lid with engraved text and emblem.
